decisions.title: How to connect a Notion MCP with Codex (4 steps)
decisions.reason: MCP integration tutorial (Merge Agent Handler → Notion → Codex). Shows MCP ecosystem growth with third-party tooling. Good for enriching MCP concept page or notion-mcp entity.
decisions.body_excerpt:
# How to connect a Notion MCP with Codex (4 steps)
Source: https://www.merge.dev/blog/notion-mcp-codex
When you hand Codex a task, you usually paraphrase what's in Notion into the task description.
Codex then works from your interpretation instead of the spec itself.

decisions.title: How to connect a Notion MCP to Cursor (4 steps)
decisions.reason: MCP integration tutorial (Merge Agent Handler → Notion → Cursor). Companion to Codex version. Shows MCP adoption across multiple coding agents.
decisions.body_excerpt:
# How to connect a Notion MCP to Cursor (4 steps)
Source: https://www.merge.dev/blog/notion-mcp-cursor

decisions.reason: One-liner: sqlite-migrate retired in favor of sqlite-utils 4.0 built-in migrations. Too thin.
